rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
Implementation-level bindings and assignments must be in implementation annexes.
References to subcomponents and ports must be resolvable within the current scope.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes depending on the statement type.
All identifiers used in AGREE contracts must be declared or visible in the current scope.
Fix unresolved references by ensuring proper scoping or remove invalid clauses.
Use only valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports in component type scopes.
Implementation bindings are valid only in component implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in component implementation scopes instead of component types.
Using unresolved identifiers or invalid types in AGREE contracts without proper declaration.
